description:
Update flake-parts and devenv modules to use nix-backed prelude:

1. Update nix/flake-parts/turnkey/default.nix:
   - Import and build turnkey-prelude derivation
   - Change prelude.strategy default from 'bundled' to 'nix'
   - Auto-set prelude.path to turnkey-prelude

2. Update nix/devenv/turnkey/buck2.nix:
   - Consume prelude derivation from flake-parts config

3. Update flake.nix:
   - Export turnkey-prelude as a package

4. Keep 'bundled' as opt-in fallback for compatibility
title: Integrate nix prelude into turnkey module
